summary: Frontend-only verification of the YouTube video cards fix in TopicDetail.jsx. Tested 3 topics from 3 different modules (Cinética Química, Eletroquímica, Equilíbrio Químico), covering 5 video cards total. All cards render as <a> tags with target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, valid href pointing to https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=... with the video title + 'química' + topic module encoded. The '▶ Abrir busca no YouTube' text is present in each card (rendered uppercase via CSS). Zero iframe elements remain inside the videos-view — the old broken embeds are gone. The entire card is clickable (588x429 px) — clicking the geometric center opens a new tab that lands on a valid YouTube search results page with 13 ytd-video-renderer results (title: 'Cinética Química - Introdução e Velocidade Média química Cinética Química - YouTube').
passed: Videos tab renders on Cinética Química, Eletroquímica, and Equilíbrio Químico topics
5/5 video cards are <a> tags with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer
Text '▶ Abrir busca no YouTube' present inside every card
0 iframe elements found inside [data-testid=videos-view] across all 3 topics
Whole card is clickable (588x429 px hit area) — clicking center opens new tab
Click opens new tab with valid YouTube search URL
YouTube search page loads with 13 relevant ytd-video-renderer results (not empty)
